members.name: Johnson Bidemi Makinde
members.bio: With a passion for fashion and a vision for elegance, Johnson founded Zekiel Apparel to celebrate individuality through bespoke design and expert craftsmanship.

members.name: Sunday Samson Oretuyi
members.bio: Sunday's mastery of pattern-making and construction is the backbone of our quality. His eye for detail ensures every garment fits like a second skin.

members.name: Mr Elijah
members.bio: Mr Elijah guides clients through their style journey with warmth and expertise, turning visions into wearable reality from the very first consultation.
